summary: A solid, mostly fire‑filled show captured on a well‑balanced audience tape that highlights strong first‑set jams and Jerry’s soaring guitar work.
review: Fans rave about the blazing first set – Cumberland, Big Railroad Blues, Me & My Uncle and a sweet Terrapin – and praise Jerry Garcia’s tone and runs. The audience recording is generally praised for its clear “Merriweather sound,” though a few note a harsh edge in the second‑set audio. Overall the performance is deemed memorable with only minor set‑list hiccups.

ai_rating.rationale: Average reviewer rating is 4.4/5, most comments highlight a great show and good audio; weighting favors the strong musical performance while acknowledging some mixed audio remarks.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and well‑balanced Merriweather venue ambience, praised for good levels; a few listeners describe the later half as harsh or indistinct.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is highlighted as a smoking, unusually placed sequence that kept the crowd energized; second set is viewed as shaky by some listeners and left a few expecting a bigger climax.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly praised for sweet tone on Terrapin, scorching runs on Cumberland, and overall stellar solos.
